title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER CANBY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for children and adults which includes diagnostic (exams, x-rays), preventative (dental sealants, cleanings, fluoride, education) and restorative (fillings, crowns, some root canals, extractions, partial and full dentures). Emergeny care provided for patients with symptoms of dental pain, an abscess, swelling or bleeding. 227 NW 3rd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10am-12pm and 1pm-6pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8am-12pm and 1pm-6pm (503) 941-3055 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 941-3055 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees bring one of the following, last 2 pay stubs, previous year's tax return or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Marion Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Canby Area Transit (CAT) for the 3X Canby Bus, Route 99X Bus, City Circulator, and Molalla to Canby Bus. Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
